pbi:mashup.document:
section Section1;
shared DefaultDestination = let

in

shared delitos_municipales_bronze = let
  Origen = Lakehouse.Contents(null),
  Navegación = Origen{[workspaceId = "cb44a997-cd49-4292-beba-1da6438240ca"]}[Data],
  #"Navegación 1" = Navegación{[lakehouseId = "d1d2b079-e220-435d-9461-d027a8614dac"]}[Data],
  #"Navegación 2" = #"Navegación 1"{[Id = "delitos_municipales_bronze", ItemKind = "Table"]}[Data]

  #"Navegación 2";
shared delitos_municipales_bronze_DataDestination = let
  Target = DefaultDestination,
  ArtifactNavigation = Target{[ItemKind = "Table", Id = "delitos_municipales_bronze"]}?[Data]?,
  Table = NavigationTable.CreateTableOnDemand(ArtifactNavigation, #table(type table[a_o = nullable Int32.Type, clave_ent = nullable Int32.Type, entidad = nullable Text.Type, cve__municipio = nullable Int32.Type, municipio = nullable Text.Type, bien_jur_dico_afectado = nullable Text.Type, tipo_de_delito = nullable Text.Type, subtipo_de_delito = nullable Text.Type, modalidad = nullable Text.Type, Atributo = nullable Text.Type, Valor = nullable Int32.Type], {}), [DeleteWhenEmpty = true])
in

[Staging = "FastCopyStaging"]
shared delitos_municipales_bronze_WriteToDataDestination = let
  delitos_municipales_bronze_WriteToDataDestination = Pipeline.ExecuteAction(ValueAction.WithTransaction([Target = delitos_municipales_bronze_DataDestination], (txn) => {TableAction.DeleteRows(txn[Target]), () => TableAction.InsertRows(txn[Target], delitos_municipales_bronze_TransformForWriteToDataDestination), Action.DoNothing}))
in
  delitos_municipales_bronze_WriteToDataDestination;
shared delitos_municipales_bronze_TransformForWriteToDataDestination = let
    SourceTable = Table.SelectColumns(delitos_municipales_bronze, {"a_o", "clave_ent", "entidad", "cve__municipio", "municipio", "bien_jur_dico_afectado", "tipo_de_delito", "subtipo_de_delito", "modalidad", "Atributo", "Valor"})
in

shared DefaultStaging = let
  DefaultStaging = Pipeline.DefaultModelStorage()
in

shared FastCopyStaging = let

in
